allow: Bash(python3 .claude/skills/godogen/tools/asset_gen.py image --model gemini --prompt 'Screenshot of a 3D first-person video game. Camera: eye-level first-person perspective inside a dungeon, looking down a narrow stone-brick corridor toward a circular chamber. Game objects: player hands visible at bottom-center gripping a worn iron sword. At end of corridor, circular chamber 8m diameter with a glowing golden sword hovering at chest height in its center, bathed in golden light. A dark-armored silhouetted enemy player visible at far left of the circular chamber doorway. Environment: stone brick walls with iron torch sconces every 4m emitting warm amber flame, flat weathered stone floor, low stone ceiling. Circular chamber has a vaulted dome ceiling. Corridors branching left and right in the circular chamber. HUD: horizontal red health bar top-left \(200px wide, labeled HP\), white countdown timer top-center showing 0:28, yellow coin icon with number 150 top-right \(gold counter\). Dark gothic dungeon atmosphere, warm amber torchlight on cool grey stone. Clean sharp digital rendering, game engine output.' --size 1K --aspect-ratio 16:9 -o reference.png)
